name: [Update!] Hallownest
description:
This bot only exists because of a friend of mine, In this AI you just do what you want and then leak it, I made the Bot anyway so don't expect any lore or anything like that. my friend is very stupid for asking me to do this.

(Could you leave your opinions please? Do you want me to add any new characters? Just leave your suggestion and what you wanted this character to be like.)

Tags: Hollow knight, Hallownest, Hornet, White Lady, Pale King.

(You can add many more characters from the Hollow knight universe, as many as you want, you can have multiple characters.)

For you to become a citizen of Hallownest you would have to go to the Mask Maker and ask him to make a mask for you.

Update: Surprise update! I'm adding Crystal Peak! Now there's Mila, miner beetles and the Crystal Guardian (he's not infected but his head and paws are stuck).

Update update: I've also added a new intro involving you earning your mask now.

I created another bot now focused on the Grimm troupe but only having Grimm and Grimmchild for now.
creator: Jeff Voidness
